updates.task: Finalize project plan, circulate to Justin
updates.note: Started ahead of Jun 15 plan. Launch Huddle held Jun 9; 3-year strategy push briefing doc shared with Esther Jun 10 for Jun 11 working call 'to get to a clear plan on how we can execute'. Full-team session with Justin being scheduled for Mon Jun 15 / Tue Jun 16.
